email_body:
Beste recruiter,

Met veel enthousiasme reageer ik op de vacature voor Content Coordinator/Specialist bij KitchenAid. Uw oproep voor een maker-gerichte aanpak en digitale content sluit naadloos aan bij mijn ervaring.

In mijn huidige rol als Junior Digital Marketer bij Episto voer ik on-page SEO uit, schrijf ik keyword-gerichte blogs en beheer ik WordPress-sites. Daarnaast heb ik op mijn eigen project mirook.com gestructureerde data (JSON-LD) en GEO toegepast om zichtbaarheid in zowel traditionele als AI-zoekmachines te verbeteren. Deze ervaring met video-editing, motion visuals en SEO sluit direct aan bij de vereisten voor deze functie.

Ik werk zelfstandig, plan mijn taken goed en communiceer helder met externe partijen. Mijn B1 Nederlands verbeter ik actief met cursussen. Ik spreek vloeiend Engels en Turks.

Ik kijk ernaar uit om mijn technische en creatieve vaardigheden in te zetten voor KitchenAid. Ik voeg mijn CV en motivatiebrief bij.

Met vriendelijke groet,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear recruiter,

I am very excited to apply for the Content Coordinator/Specialist position at KitchenAid. Your call for a maker-focused approach and digital content aligns perfectly with my experience.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I handle on-page SEO, write keyword-targeted blogs, and manage WordPress sites. Additionally, on my own project mirook.com, I have applied structured data (JSON-LD) and GEO to improve visibility in both traditional and AI-powered search engines. This experience with video editing, motion visuals, and SEO directly matches the requirements for this role.

I work independently, plan my tasks well, and communicate clearly with external parties. My B1 Dutch is improving through courses. I speak fluent English and Turkish.

I look forward to bringing my technical and creative skills to KitchenAid. I attach my CV and cover letter.

Best regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cover_letter:
Beste lezer,

Toen ik de vacature voor Content Coordinator/Specialist bij KitchenAid zag, voelde ik meteen een klik. KitchenAid staat voor kwaliteit, stijl en innovatie in de keuken – waarden die ik herken in mijn eigen werk. U zoekt iemand die digitale content tot leven brengt, en dat is precies waar ik energie van krijg.

In mijn huidige functie als Junior Digital Marketer bij Episto ben ik verantwoordelijk voor on-page SEO, het schrijven van keyword-gerichte blogs en het bouwen en onderhouden van WordPress-sites. Ik werk met tools zoals SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics en Search Console om prestaties te meten en te verbeteren. Daarnaast heb ik op mijn eigen project mirook.com ervaring opgedaan met video-editing, motion graphics en gestructureerde data (JSON-LD schema) om zichtbaarheid in zowel traditionele als AI-zoekmachines te optimaliseren. Dit sluit direct aan bij de vereisten voor video-editing, motion visuals en SEO in deze functie.

Uw verantwoordelijkheden rondom content- en categoriemanagement, creatieve productie en agency-samenwerking spreken mij aan. Ik heb ervaring met het coördineren van workflows en het communiceren met externe partners. Bij Episto werk ik zelfstandig en plan ik mijn eigen deadlines, wat me goed voorbereidt op het beheren van meerdere projecten tegelijk.

Ik spreek vloeiend Engels en Turks, en mijn Nederlands is B1 – ik volg actief cursussen om dit verder te verbeteren. Ik woon in Zwijndrecht, vlakbij Antwerpen, en ben flexibel inzetbaar.

Ik zou graag mijn technische en creatieve vaardigheden inzetten om de online aanwezigheid van KitchenAid te versterken. Ik hoop u in een gesprek meer te vertellen over hoe ik bij kan dragen aan het team.

Met vriendelijke groet,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok

--- English version ---

Dear reader,

When I saw the vacancy for Content Coordinator/Specialist at KitchenAid, I felt an immediate connection. KitchenAid stands for quality, style, and innovation in the kitchen – values I recognize in my own work. You are looking for someone who brings digital content to life, and that is exactly what energizes me.

In my current role as Junior Digital Marketer at Episto, I am responsible for on-page SEO, writing keyword-targeted blogs, and building and maintaining WordPress sites. I work with tools like SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, and Search Console to measure and improve performance. Additionally, on my own project mirook.com, I have gained experience with video editing, motion graphics, and structured data (JSON-LD schema) to optimize visibility in both traditional and AI-powered search engines. This directly aligns with the requirements for video editing, motion visuals, and SEO in this role.

Your responsibilities around content and category management, creative production, and agency collaboration appeal to me. I have experience coordinating workflows and communicating with external partners. At Episto, I work independently and plan my own deadlines, which prepares me well for managing multiple projects simultaneously.

I speak fluent English and Turkish, and my Dutch is B1 – I am actively taking courses to improve further. I live in Zwijndrecht, near Antwerp, and am flexible.

I would love to apply my technical and creative skills to strengthen KitchenAid's online presence. I hope to tell you more in an interview about how I can contribute to the team.

Best regards,
Baver Ok
+32 470 42 48 36
baverok@gmail.com
linkedin.com/in/baverok
cv_highlights:
- Hands-on video editing and motion graphics experience from mirook.com project
- Solid on-page and technical SEO skills applied daily at Episto
- Experience managing digital content workflows and coordinating with external agencies
- Self-directed with strong organizational skills, managing multiple projects independently
- Fluent English and Turkish; B1 Dutch with active improvement
tailored_cv:
Baver Ok
Digital Marketing · SEO · GEO · Content · Web
Zwijndrecht, Belgium | +32 470 42 48 36 | baverok@gmail.com | linkedin.com/in/baverok

PROFILE
Junior digital marketer with a technical foundation in web design, SEO, and GEO (Generative Engine Optimization). At Episto, I run on-page SEO, keyword-targeted content, and full-cycle WordPress site build and maintenance for client sites. On my own project (mirook.com) I've applied structured data, entity optimization, and technical SEO/GEO audits to improve visibility across both traditional and AI-powered search engines. Comfortable across content management, social media coordination, and performance reporting; quick to pick up new tools and platforms, and growing into analytics, e-commerce content management, and campaign support. Based in Zwijndrecht, next to Antwerp. Works in English and Turkish; Dutch: B1, currently taking classes to improve further.

CORE SKILLS
- SEO & GEO: on-page SEO, keyword research, technical SEO audits, structured data / JSON-LD schema, entity optimization, GEO & AEO (AI search visibility)
- Content & CMS: SEO blog & content writing, editorial content publishing, website content management, WordPress site building
- Video & motion: video editing, motion graphics (via mirook.com project)
- Web & build: WordPress, Elementor, Astra theme, responsive web design, Canva, AI-assisted content tools
- Analytics & reporting: Google Analytics, Google Search Console, SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Ads
- Social: social media content & integration
- Languages: English (professional), Turkish (native), Dutch (B1)

EXPERIENCE

Junior Digital Marketer — Episto (Remote), 2026–present
- Own on-page SEO for client websites, from keyword research to publishing, improving organic visibility and search rankings
- Write keyword-targeted blog content for client websites to grow organic traffic
- Build and maintain client websites in WordPress using Elementor and the Astra theme, including content uploads and page updates
- Track site performance with SEMrush, Ahrefs, Google Analytics, Google Search Console, and Google Ads to guide SEO and content decisions

Warehouse & Logistics — Katoen Natie (Antwerp), 2025–2026
- Maintained accuracy and efficiency in a high-volume, fast-paced logistics environment

Front-End Developer — ViviDoctor (Belgium), 2018–2019
- Developed and optimized front-end features for a healthcare web application (AngularJS, JavaScript)

PROJECTS

mirook.com — Website Design, SEO & GEO (2025–present)
- Designed and built a multi-page WordPress site (Elementor, Astra) for a Belgian youth chess champion: full site structure, on-page SEO, and social media integration (Instagram/Facebook)
- Implemented structured data (JSON-LD schema, including SportsEvent and FAQPage), entity/knowledge-graph markup, and an llms.txt file to improve visibility across traditional and AI-powered search engines (GEO/AEO)
- Ran iterative technical SEO/GEO audits, measurably raising the site's overall search-health score
- Created video and motion content for digital platforms

EDUCATION
- Karel de Grote Hogeschool, Antwerp — Coursework in Applied Computer Science (2022–2025)
- Celal Bayar University, Türkiye — Coursework in Computer Science (2012–2016)
- Diyarbakır Anatolian High School, Türkiye — High School Diploma (2012)

REFERENCES
Available on request.
